Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1800 "STARCRASH-1000-1800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Star Crash.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1000 to set $02A8 to the magic value of $25 in order to allow the game to start without crashing.
